# Issue 9580 - Mac Metal verification

Date: 2026-06-29
Host: macOS 26.2, Apple Silicon arm64, Apple M4 Max

## Commands

```bash
cmake --build <local-llama-build>/darwin-arm64 --target llama-bench -- -j 8

node plugins/plugin-local-inference/native/verify/metal-perf-matrix.mjs \
  --bench <local-llama-build>/darwin-arm64/bin/llama-bench \
  --models-dir <local-model-root> \
  --depths 0,4096 \
  --out .github/issue-evidence/9580-apple-metal-2026-06-29 \
  --json

make -C plugins/plugin-local-inference/native/verify \
  metal-verify metal-verify-multiblock metal-verify-fused
```

## Result

PASS.

- `llama-bench` rebuilt successfully from the local Darwin arm64 Metal build.
- Metal perf matrix ran against the staged `eliza-1-0_8b` GGUF bundle with Metal backend `MTL` and flash attention enabled.
- Correctness gates passed for base Metal kernels, multiblock variants, fused QJL/TBQ and QJL/Polar attention, and Polar pre-Hadamard scoring.

## Perf Snapshot

| tier | arch | size | params | pp512 t/s | tg128 t/s | tg@d=0 | tg@d=4096 |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 0_8b | qwen35 0.8B Q4_K - Medium | 521 MiB | 752M | 5415.3 +/- 666 | 38.6 +/- 10 | 38.6 +/- 10 | 41.4 +/- 10 |

## Artifacts

- Raw perf JSON: `9580-apple-metal-2026-06-29/metal-perf-matrix.json`
- Perf table: `9580-apple-metal-2026-06-29/metal-perf-matrix.md`
- Correctness log: `9580-mac-metal-verify-2026-06-29.log`

## Scope Note

Only the `0_8b` local inference bundle was staged on this Mac at capture time, so this is not a full tier sweep. It does cover real Apple Metal execution and the Metal kernel correctness matrix on this host.
